content.en:
"What a terrifying extra-dimensional realm, it is definitely more powerful than an ordinary extra-dimensional realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, he didn't know exactly how powerful that extradimensional creature was.

After all, even an ordinary extradimensional realm could kill him in an instant, and ten times more powerful than a hundred times would have the same result, so he couldn't judge.

Subsequently, Ye Tian condensed a replica body and tried to sneak into the Dragon Cave Ridge again.

As a result, this time it was quickly discovered by an extradimensional realm creature and was instantly killed by it.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian kept adjusting his direction and kept trying to go to the Dragon Cave Ridge.

Finally, when Ye Tian tried the thirteenth attempt, he finally crossed this area and came to the entrance of Dragon Cave Ridge.

"It's not easy!"

He immediately continued to condense a copy body here, otherwise if the copy body fell in the Dragon Cave Ridge, he would have to try again.

So, let's make sure that this replica body survives first.

Soon, the cohesion was successful.

Next, he officially entered the Dragon Cave Ridge.

......

The 20 main dangers in Dragon Cave Ridge are some extradimensional creatures, and there are also extradimensional creatures in the extradimensional realm here, but there should not be many of them.

Because the Dragon Cave Ridge is not huge, it is far less vast than the territory of the Death Void.

Moreover, when it comes to the extra-dimensional realm, the resources of the Dragon Cave Ridge are not very useful to the extra-dimensional realm, except for a very small number of resources.

Therefore, most of the extradimensional creatures in the extradimensional realm are outside the Dragon Cave Ridge, and only a very small number of extradimensional creatures in the extradimensional realm live in the Dragon Cave Ridge.

To show that, Dragon Cave Ridge seemed to be no different from other super dimensional treasure lands, but Ye Tian was very cautious.

"Found a treasure!"

Ye Tian came to a purple-red green vine and recognized this extra-dimensional resource-Red Purple Devil Vine, this is a good thing, the red wisteria liquid extracted from inside helps to refine the super-dimensional body of the half-step super-dimensional realm, although it is not as good as the effect of the super-dimensional origin bead, but it is also many times more powerful than his own silent cultivation effect.

It can be said that this red purple vine alone is worth at least 1 billion Gala Treasure Coins.

A random piece of extra-dimensional resources is worth 1 billion Galanbao coins, which is unimaginable!

"In the Death Void of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory, I have found countless extradimensional resources over the long years, and the accumulation of them is far less than this Red Purple Demon Vine!" Ye Tian said darkly.

It can be said that those ordinary territories are too ordinary, and there is not much wealth at all.

It was only when the Garan Chamber of Commerce's Garan Treasure Ship had to do business that it entered the territory of No. 7362, and for many powerful extradimensional forces, it was not an ordinary territory at all.

It's like the Six-Winged Family, which can't look down on the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory at all, and only the Eternal Realm can provide it with a Transcendent Origin Pearl, which is valuable.

"Take this red purple vine out and send it to that replica body, otherwise once it falls, this treasure may be lost!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Next, he continued to look for resources.

The resources found later are not as good as the red purple magic vine, but they also have a lot of value.

As the years passed, the total value of those extradimensional resources he obtained had exceeded 10 billion superdimensional treasure coins, and this was just the beginning.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found the golden pith of immortality, and there was more than one drop.

I saw that in a golden ocean, a drop of immortal golden pith was about to dazzle, but there were many extra-dimensional creatures here, the weakest of which were comparable to the top peak realm gods, and most of them had reached the half-step transcendent realm.

Moreover, there are also extradimensional creatures at the level of the extradimensional realm.

As soon as Ye Tian approached, he was directly killed by the extradimensional realm creature in an instant.

"So many immortal golden pith are of little use to extradimensional creatures, they don't need to open up the superdimensional heart domain, and without the superdimensional heart domain, they can't use the immortal golden pith to refine the superdimensional power, so they shouldn't care about the immortal golden pith. "

Ye Tian muttered.

If an extra-dimensional creature wants to be promoted to the extra-dimensional realm, it needs to evolve and transform the extra-dimensional bloodline, and after repeated evolutionary transformations, it can break through to the extra-dimensional realm.

However, the direction of evolution of cultivators is different, and they must refine the power of transcendent dimensions.

"There are so many immortal golden pith here, and there is really a possibility that there are immortal golden pith beads!"

Ye Tian guessed.

But his strength is too weak to defeat the extradimensional realm creatures stationed here.

That is to copy the body of the extradimensional creature here, and blend in as an extradimensional creature.

Soon, he locked onto the body of an Ice Escape Horned Beast, turned into a half-step Ice Escape Horned Beast of the Transcendent Dimension Realm, and then dived into this golden ocean.

Although a wave of powerful extradimensional power came and spied on him, after discovering that he was an ice escaped horned beast, he did not continue to spy on him.

Next, Ye Tian quickly blended into this extra-dimensional biological race, but he was not in a hurry to collect the immortal golden pith.

For him, the Immortal Golden Marrow is of little use, he can only give his relatives and the Terrans, the Immortal Golden Marrow Beads he really needs. []

Therefore, until he found the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead, he would not really collect it.

After a long time, Ye Tian mixed well in the Ice Dun Horned Beast clan, and knew many Ice Escape Horned Beasts, and he searched for a lot of places here, and finally found the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead.

"There's an immortal golden pith bead here, take it!"

"There's one here, too, 637 has been collected!"

"This Ice Escape Horned Beast actually used the three Immortal Golden Pith Beads as decorations, and it had to find a way to get them. "

Ye Tian continued to plan here, collecting one immortal golden pith bead after another.

Gradually, the long years passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already collected more than sixty Immortal Golden Pile Beads.

Subsequently, he took these immortal golden marrow beads out, and found a place to start refining and refining the power of the extradimensional.

......

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian used the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead to refine the superdimensional power in the superdimensional heart domain, and condensed three replica bodies to spy around in three directions to prevent the superdimensional creatures from approaching, once he got close, he had to stop or leave immediately.

In this way, a period of time passed.

During this period, Ye Tian also tried to find various resources as well as the Immortal Golden Essence and the Immortal Golden Essence Bead, and the value of the treasures obtained on his body was unimaginable.

It can be said that in the general extradimensional realm, at this time, his net worth is inferior to him.

But he didn't dare to go out now, so he could only stay here and practice.

Before you know it, five extradimensional epochs have passed.

And during this period of time, he has been cultivating in the Dragon Cave Ridge, and has transferred the cultivation place many times, just to protect the resources in his hands.
